title: ne0hud
body:
**THIS MOD WILL NOT BE PORTED TO FORGE OR OLDER VERSIONS THAN 1.18.2**

### A really minimalistic Head-Up Display (HUD) for Minecraft.

**Supports Mod Menu integration** (Install [Cloth Config](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config "Cloth Config"))

##### Features:
- Show FPS
- Show Co-ordinates
- Show custom text
- Custom HEX color for the text

More features may be added in future.

![HUD In-Game](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/758001449992192013/991630711155068968/unknown.png "HUD In-Game")

#### Redistribution info
Please do not redistribute this mod on another websites without my approval. Email me and we can discuss it.
You CAN use this mod in modpacks.
